headline: Tax Credit Carry-Forward Management (up to 20 years) Preparation Checklist — San Francisco
articleBody:
Tax Credit Carry-Forward Management (up to 20 years) Preparation Checklist for San Francisco Clients

Before your Tax Credit Carry-Forward Management (up to 20 years) appointment with Reclaim Tax Credit Specialists, make sure you have the following ready:

1. Payroll records
2. Tip reports
3. Tax returns
4. Employee w-2s
5. Credit card statements

Contact Reclaim Tax Credit Specialists at (213) 537-5613 to get started.
